# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Cross-account IAM role for CI/CD with wildcard trust for multiple accounts in an AWS Organization

Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: cicd-cross-account-role
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
  PrincipalArnPattern:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:iam::*:role/*"
    Description: Wildcard pattern for allowed principal role ARNs (e.g., arn:aws:iam::*:role/ci-* or arn:aws:iam::*:role/*)
  RequireExternalId:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ["true", "false"]
    Default: "false"
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    NoEcho: true

Conditions:
  UseExternalId: !Equals [!Ref RequireExternalId, "true"]

Resources:
  CicdCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAssumeRoleFromOrgWithWildcardPrincipal
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - "sts:AssumeRole"
              - "sts:TagSession"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
              ArnLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn: !Ref PrincipalArnPattern
              StringEqualsIfExists:
                sts:ExternalId: !If [UseExternalId, !Ref ExternalId, !Ref "AWS::NoValue"]
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: cicd-minimal-placeholder
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Sid: PlaceholderNoPermissions
                Effect: Deny
                Action: []
                Resource: "*"

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt CicdCrossAccountRole.Arn
  RoleName:
    Value: !Ref CicdCrossAccountRole
